evidence: Using the prebuilt /Users/carlosgomez/Documents/IOActice/Researchs/agent-audit/vulnhunter/builds/protobuf-asan-arm64 artifacts, the malformed unknown length-delimited field decoded to length 2147483632 (0x7ffffff0), which remained positive when cast to int. LLDB failed to launch because debugserver is missing, explicit-arch LLDB failed identically, and GDB failed on the generated DWARF, so the final fallback used an instrumented debug PoC. Captured state showed current_limit_=2147483647 before and after SkipField(), BytesUntilLimit()=-1 only in the normal no-sub-limit sense, BufferSize() shrinking from 8 to 0, and SkipField() returning false at EOF. No negative size, overflowed count, corrupted limit, or limit bypass was observed.
